# Stock Availability

The Stock Availability section on each product page displays a live count of available units from the nearest fulfilment centre. A low-stock banner is triggered when fewer than five units are left, and customers can join a waitlist for items that are out of stock, receiving an email notification when inventory is replenished. Stock figures are updated every fifteen minutes, which may lead to slight discrepancies between the checkout count and the display on the product page shortly beforehand.

[Source: product_information.md#stock-availability]
